goal: Fix thin/duplicate-title suit pages (crawled-not-indexed) by server-rendering their SEO essentials
done: Suit pages (tarot-card-meanings/<suit>.html + th, 5 suits x EN/TH) were JS-rendered shells with a GENERIC DUPLICATE <title> ('Tarot Card Meanings | MeowTarot'), empty meta description, and empty #suitIntro -> ~80 words each = 'crawled-not-indexed'. New scripts/sync-suit-static-seo.mjs reads SUIT_COPY/SUIT_COPY_TH from js/suit-page.js and bakes unique static <title>, meta description, og/twitter title+desc, og:url, H1 (#suitTitle) and intro (#suitIntro) into all 10 shells. Page JS still hydrates the same at runtime. Each suit now has a unique title/description/intro (EN: 'Cups Tarot Card Meanings'; TH: 'ความหมายไพ่เหรียญ').
verified: Ran -> 10 pages baked; all 5 EN titles unique; TH titles localized; diff = SEO fields only. (Listing pages were already fine at 474-815 words; the 9 GSC 404s were stale data — shims live, all 200.)
